title: Bulbophyllum septemtrionale
taxonomy: Bulbophyllum septemtrionale is classified under the family Orchidaceae. This classification places it within the order Asparagales and the class Liliopsida. At the kingdom level, it belongs to Plantae. The species is further classified into the genus Bulbophyllum, which is a large and diverse group of orchids. Bulbophyllum septemtrionale is native to tropical regions and is known for its unique and often fragrant flowers.
